title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has issued a warning about Claude's expanding role in AI development, including code writing, review, experimentation, and system optimization. Both Anthropic and OpenAI are calling attention to risks of recursive self-improvement and advocating for coordinated safety governance as AI capabilities advance.
